title: nakal #5230
definition:
1) to be deceitful, be crafty, be knavish
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be knavish
        1a2) deceiver (participle)
    1b) (Piel) to beguile
    1c) (Hithpael) to act craftily, act knavishly, deal knavishly
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be deceitful, be crafty, be knavish
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be knavish
        1a2) deceiver (participle)
    1b) (Piel) to beguile
    1c) (Hithpael) to act craftily, act knavishly, deal knavishly

    NASB:  to be crafty, deceitful or knavish
